heading: About Henry Perkins
heroDescription: Customer-facing technical consultant focused on AI-assisted workflows, WordPress delivery, and practical systems that help support and product teams work more clearly.

sectionLabels.capabilities: AI all day. Everything else too.

intro: I build technical projects that stay close to real customer needs: AI prompt tooling, interactive web apps like a tarot reading AI and a DJ mixing platform, WordPress consulting sites, and a React portfolio deployed to Cloudflare Workers.

What ties those projects together is the same throughline in my support, community, and consulting background: I like taking messy information and turning it into clear workflows, calmer operations, and practical tools that non-specialists can actually use.

I am especially interested in scaling up my AI and WordPress skills because they fit the work I already do best. AI helps me prototype better summaries, triage, and self-service experiences; WordPress remains one of the fastest ways to ship useful business outcomes. Growing in both areas is how I am building a long-term customer-facing technical career rooted in empathy and execution.

profile.cardSubtitle: Where tech meets tenacity — and Java isn’t just coffee

capabilities.title: AI Agents & Prompt Engineering
description: I design agentic workflows — prompt pipelines, reasoning chains, autonomous loops — and the tooling that makes them repeatable. Not demos. Not proof-of-concepts. Systems that hold up when a real person presses the button.
I built Prompt Forge because I needed a place to design, iterate, and organize prompts at scale. Then I shipped it so other people could too.

capabilities.title: Technical Consulting & Delivery
description: Full-arc project ownership: discovery, scoping, build, launch, post-launch. WordPress and WooCommerce platforms. Cloudflare Workers deployments. API integrations and webhook configs. React + TypeScript front ends.
I don’t hand off half-finished work — I ship it, document it, and make sure someone else can maintain it after I leave.

capabilities.title: Documentation & Developer Enablement
description: The best system in the world fails the moment the person who built it walks away. I write the docs, build the onboarding paths, and create the internal tooling that turns tribal knowledge into something a new hire can actually follow.

I’ve been doing this since I ran a developer community of 50 WordPress professionals at PageLines — answering questions, finding resources, traveling to WordCamps, and making sure feedback made it back into the product.

valueCards.title: Customer Empathy
valueCards.description: I treat every support request like a human conversation first, then solve the technical root cause.

valueCards.title: Clarity
valueCards.description: Clear notes, reproducible debugging steps, and clean handoffs keep projects moving without surprises.

valueCards.title: Execution
valueCards.description: I prioritize practical delivery so teams can see progress quickly and build confidence with each release.
